atlas v0.5
Back To Use Cases

Use Case

Creator / Anti-Template Launch

适合创作者品牌、反模板发布页和态度鲜明的个人项目。可以更大胆，但不能乱。

Primary Family

Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid

Structures

Catalog ExplorerImmersive Stage

Why This Fit Works

从任务反推视觉和结构

Content Shape

Strong attitude, image punches, selective disorder, memorable modules.

User Goal

摆脱模板感，让站点一眼就有个性，同时保持可读性和导航。

Why

重点是摆脱千篇一律，但结构仍然要可读。

Avoid

  • 为了态度牺牲基本层级
  • 全站处处用重色和冲突
  • 没有退出路径

Recommended Families

这个场景最适合借哪几条家族

Web Family

Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid

A deliberately less obedient family: bold shapes, anti-grid moments, bright accents, and a visible attitude against neutral template sameness.

Historical Roots

Postmodern / MemphisBrutalism / Neo-Brutalism

Best For

creator brandsexperimental commerceidentity-led products
Open family
Web Family

Stage-Driven Showcase

A hero or first fold behaves like a stage. One image, scene, or world carries the page before the rest of the content unfolds.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxuryCyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Best For

campaignsflagship launchesfilm and entertainment
Open family

Prompt Packet

可以直接复制给 agent 的场景提示

Prompt Packet

Creator / Anti-Template Launch

Content type: Creator / Anti-Template Launch IA layer: Catalog Explorer / Immersive Stage Visual family: Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid + Stage-Driven Showcase Reference packet: Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid / Stage-Driven Showcase Mood: 适合创作者品牌、反模板发布页和态度鲜明的个人项目。可以更大胆，但不能乱。 Required traits: 摆脱模板感，让站点一眼就有个性，同时保持可读性和导航。 Avoid: 为了态度牺牲基本层级 / 全站处处用重色和冲突 / 没有退出路径

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
